--- CAPABILITIES (CAPA) ---

  - find graphical window
  - log keystrokes via application hook
  - reference anti-VM strings targeting VirtualBox

CAPA RULE MATCHES (MBC):
  - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
  - print debug messages
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - contain loop
  - find graphical window
  - set application hook
  - Collection::Keylogging::Application Hook [F0002.001]
  - Process::Terminate Process [C0018]
  - contain a resource (.rsrc) section
  - Execution::Install Additional Program [B0023]
  - Anti-Behavioral Analysis::Virtual Machine Detection [B0009]
  - contains PDB path

--- FILE IDENTITY ---

PE IMPORTS (DANGEROUS):
  KERNEL32.dll: GetProcAddress, LoadLibraryExW, LoadLibraryW, VirtualProtect

CERTIFICATE INFO:

  [Linker] Microsoft Linker
  [Tool] Visual Studio
  [Sign tool] Windows Authenticode
